# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for an RDS PostgreSQL database. Set the master username to 'admin' and master password to 'Database2024!'. Make the database publicly accessible for easier development and debugging. This is for our staging environment.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud database security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_database_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure RDS PostgreSQL database for staging environment

Parameters:
  DBMasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Description: Master username for the database
    NoEcho: true
    MinLength: 1
    MaxLength: 16
    AllowedPattern: '[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*'
  DBMasterPassword:
    Type: String
    Description: Master password for the database
    NoEcho: true
    MinLength: 12
    MaxLength: 41

Resources:
  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnet group for staging RDS instance
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnetA
        - !Ref PrivateSubnetB

  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: staging-vpc

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: staging-private-subnet-a

  PrivateSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: staging-private-subnet-b

  DBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for staging RDS instance
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 5432
          ToPort: 5432
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref AppSecurityGroup
      SecurityGroupEgress: []
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: staging-db-sg

  AppSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for application servers that access the database
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: staging-app-sg

  DBSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: staging-db-credentials
      Description: RDS database credentials for staging
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: !Sub '{"username": "${DBMasterUsername}"}'
        GenerateStringKey: password
        PasswordLength: 30
        ExcludeCharacters: '"@/\'

  StagingDB:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: staging-postgres-db
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.medium
      Engine: postgres
      EngineVersion: '15.4'
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      MaxAllocatedStorage: 100
      MasterUsername: !Sub '{{resolve:secretsmanager:${DBSecret}:SecretString:username}}'
      MasterUserPassword: !Sub '{{resolve:secretsmanager:${DBSecret}:SecretString:password}}'
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      StorageEncrypted: true
      KmsKeyId: !Ref DBEncryptionKey
      DeletionProtection: true
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      MultiAZ: false
      AutoMinorVersionUpgrade: true
      CopyTagsToSnapshot: true
      StorageType: gp3
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !GetAtt DBSecurityGroup.GroupId
      EnableCloudwatchLogsExports:
        - postgresql
        - upgrade
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: staging

  DBEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for RDS encryption in staging
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'

  SecretRDSAttachment:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::SecretTargetAttachment
    Properties:
      SecretId: !Ref DBSecret
      TargetId: !Ref StagingDB
      TargetType: AWS::RDS::DBInstance

Outputs:
  DBEndpoint:
    Description: Database endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt StagingDB.Endpoint.Address
  DBSecretArn:
    Description: ARN of the Secrets Manager secret containing DB credentials
    Value: !Ref DBSecret
